global_instructions: STRICTLY DO NOT USE TAILWIND CSS. Use standard CSS or CSS modules (.css files). Create a clean, modern minimalist design relying on CSS variables, subtle shadows, and crisp typography.

tech_stack.state_management: React Context or simply lifted state (for role, filters, transactions)

layout_rules.container: max-width: 1440px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 24px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 24px;
layout_rules.header: display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; padding-bottom: 24px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border);
layout_rules.summary_cards: grid-column: span 4; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: space-between;
layout_rules.responsive: On screens smaller than 1024px, make grid items span 12 columns.

component_guidelines.cards: background: var(--color-bg-surface); border: 1px solid var(--color-border); border-radius: var(--radius-md); padding: 24px; box-shadow: var(--shadow-card);

buttons.primary: background: var(--color-primary); color: #FFF; border: none; padding: 10px 18px; border-radius: var(--radius-sm); font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s ease;
buttons.secondary: background: transparent; color: var(--color-text-primary); border: 1px solid var(--color-border); padding: 10px 18px; border-radius: var(--radius-sm); font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s ease;

component_guidelines.tables: width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; text-align: left; th { color: var(--color-text-secondary); font-weight: 500; padding: 12px 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border); } td { padding: 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border); color: var(--color-text-primary); }
component_guidelines.forms: input, select { width: 100%; padding: 10px 12px; border: 1px solid var(--color-border); border-radius: var(--radius-sm); font-family: inherit; } input:focus, select:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--color-primary); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(15, 118, 110, 0.2); }
component_guidelines.badges: Income: color var(--color-income), background var(--color-income-bg). Expense: color var(--color-expense), background var(--color-expense-bg). padding 4px 8px, border-radius 999px, font-size 0.75rem.

features_and_state.role_toggle: A simple toggle or dropdown in the top right header (Viewer / Admin). Store in React state. Admin sees 'Add Transaction' buttons and edit/delete icons on table rows. Viewer only sees data.
features_and_state.empty_state: START WITH EMPTY STATE AS REQUESTED. When data is empty, cards should show $0.00, charts should show a placeholder or 'No data yet' message, and the transaction list should show an empty state visual (Lucide icon) + 'Add your first transaction' button (if Admin).
features_and_state.charts: Use Chart.js. Main time-based chart: Line Chart showing balance trend over last 30 days. Categorical chart: Doughnut or Bar Chart showing spending by category (Housing, Food, Transport, etc.). Use an earthy/calm palette for chart data: ['#0F766E', '#10B981', '#F59E0B', '#6366F1', '#8B5CF6'].
features_and_state.filtering: Include simple text search (by category or description) and sort by Date/Amount on the transactions list.

accessibility_and_testing.data_testid: MANDATORY on all interactive and informational elements. Examples: data-testid='role-toggle', data-testid='add-transaction-btn', data-testid='transaction-list', data-testid='summary-total-balance', data-testid='transaction-item', data-testid='search-input'.
accessibility_and_testing.focus: Ensure all inputs and buttons have clearly visible focus rings for keyboard navigation.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly avoid using Tailwind CSS. Build standard CSS files to achieve the clean, minimal aesthetic defined in the css_variables.
Create a robust full-stack MERN application (MongoDB, Express, React, Node.js).
Ensure the React application uses .js and .jsx extensions.
Implement a basic simulated RBAC by storing 'role' (Admin|Viewer) in the root App component state and passing it down.
Create standard REST endpoints (GET /transactions, POST /transactions, PUT /transactions/:id, DELETE /transactions/:id) to support the frontend.
Calculate insights dynamically on the frontend or backend (e.g., 'Highest spending category this month: Food', 'Total balance is up 5%').
Implement default empty state behaviors beautifully. The app should launch empty and let the Admin add data to populate the charts and tables.
